title: Dungeons and Minecraft
description: This addon to the Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks will bring an adventurous DnD atmosphere to your game!
body:
The mod adds new spells inspired by the board game DnD, a variety of new weapons, magical items and new mobs to the game.

# Spells
In addition to adding new spells, the mod also provides new unique mechanics - components for spells! Now, some spells require you to have certain items in order for the spell to work.

ATTENTION: Before updating the mod, delete the "dnmmod-spell-components.toml" file from the config folder, otherwise the components of some spells may not be displayed correctly!
![Components](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5cba3e32d6872147047d7e630e2e58210877139.jpeg)

# Items
## Magic wands
   Magic wands are unique magical items, each of which increases the power of spells of a certain school.
![magic wand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eb7c4b9db4f8cbbd39d7de1310ccba9f56c9703_0.webp)
## Magic Items
  Magical items include wand cores, as well as unique items that can be obtained from mobs.
   ![magic items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0648ac5bedb563d651bbff0642ed1c231e556fc5.jpeg)
## Weapons
   ![Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7940e70941cc4c54d5efa82bb0c6af528e58608f_0.webp)
## Armor
   ![Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ea7413f954dd937db680c761091cd2cf1ae59e7.jpeg)
   

# Mobs
The mod adds new mobs: from a simple raven to ghosts that attack at the most unexpected moment.
![mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fccdd112082a3e3d28b2be25d90a94b672589649.jpeg)
You can also face two bosses! They will attack you with various spells.
![Bosses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd92ad47e23fde98b433ae3ea55bc8c0cf0a541a.jpeg)

# Future
The mod has just started development. There are plans to add more mobs, spells, and unique mechanics in the future.

# Thanks
Yeeee - Some textures and models

DeGon - Some textures and models
